name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BACKLOG-8
title: Dead-code sweep: remove tombstone inv, test, and stale contract refs
description:
Three items per the ws37 dead-code sweep rubric:
1. DELETE Inv 5 (entire section) from spec.md — describes retired tdd-drift-check.py invocation contract; script has zero runtime callers and was deleted in BACKLOG-7; invariant is pure tombstone with no live behavior.
2. PRUNE test-no-originals-in-tdd-subagent.py — remove DELETED_SCRIPTS (tdd-context.py, tdd-drift-check.py) tombstone absence assertions; keep OWNED_SCRIPTS (tdd-step.py) live assertions.
3. DELETE test-tdd-state-prune.py — asserts 'review' and 'merged' are invalid tdd-step.py states; these states never existed in the current codebase and have no forward pressure.
4. CROSS-FEATURE: remove tdd-subagent/docs/spec/contract.md refs to tdd-context.py and tdd-drift-check.py — stale cross-refs to deleted scripts (lines 41-42, 65).

history.note: Closed: deleted Inv 5 tombstone, pruned test-no-originals, deleted test-tdd-state-prune, fixed tdd-subagent contract refs. PR #169.
